elements.caption: Variables are created automatically as soon as HeishaMon publishes the corresponding topics.

items.caption: If an external energy meter (e.g. Shelly 3EM) measures the heat pump supply line, select its variables here. The module then calculates the measured COP and the daily performance factor from the meter readings.

items.name: PowerVariable
items.caption: Energy meter: active power of the heat pump (W)

items.name: EnergyVariable
items.caption: Energy meter: energy counter of the heat pump (kWh)
